message:
chore(gitignore): add beads ephemeral file patterns

Add patterns to ignore beads runtime artifacts that should not be tracked:
- .beads/last-touched: Timestamp file updated on each beads interaction
- .beads/.bv.lock: Lock file with PID for beads viewer

These files are ephemeral and machine-specific. The issues.jsonl file
remains tracked as the canonical source of truth for issue state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,6 +24,10 @@ Thumbs.db
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
 
+# Beads ephemeral files (runtime artifacts, not issues.jsonl)
+.beads/last-touched
+.beads/.bv.lock
+
 # Coverage reports
 /coverage/
